metadata.name: Core Nexus 4K Essential (RPDB)
metadata.description: A full-featured 4K build for TorBox Essential users. No Usenet access required -- runs entirely on TorBox's torrent cache.

config.addonDescription: Unleashed 4K TorBox Essential. DV/HDR + TrueHD/Atmos + Uncapped Bitrate + AV1 Enabled.

excludedStreamExpressions.expression: /*Upscaled 4k*/(queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))>=1) and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3', 'DE Web T1', 'DE Web T2', 'DE Web T3', 'DE Web Scene', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web Scene')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(streams,'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 4k Anime*/ (isAnime and originalLanguage == 'Japanese' and count(quality(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(seadex(resolution(streams, '2160p'))) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'BD T1', 'BD T2', 'BD T3', 'BD T4', 'BD T5', 'BD T6', 'BD T7', 'BD T8', 'Remux T1', 'Remux T2', 'Remux T3', 'Web T1', 'Web T2', 'Web T3', 'Web T4', 'Web T5', 'Web T6')) == 0 )? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(streams, '2160p')) : []

/*Bad 4k Bluray*/(queryType=='movie' or queryType =='series') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(rseMatched(resolution(streams, '2160p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p')):[]
/*ongoingSeasonPack*/((queryType=='series' or queryType=='anime.series') and ongoingSeason and (daysSinceLastAired <-1 or daysUntilNextEpisode>=0))?seasonPack(streams,'onlySeasons'):[]

/*Final Limit (All)*/ merge(count(quality(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip')) >20? quality(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),streams),'HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV','CAM','TS','TC','SCR'):count(quality(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV')) >10? quality(streams,'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'):[],count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) >25? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),3))):count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p')) >20? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'720p','576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),6))):count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >12? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'))):count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >15? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),6))):count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >10? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), -1))):count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p')) >5? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(slice(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), 6), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','stremio-usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), -1))):[])

/*Extra Cached (HQ)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'Unknown'), 6))

/*Extra Cached (LQ)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'TC','SCR'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'TC','SCR'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'Unknown'), 6))

/*Extra Uncached (All)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEB-DL'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEB-DL'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEBRip'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'WEBRip'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'Unknown'), 6))

/*Unknown Resolution*/ count(resolution(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), '2160p', '1440p', '1080p','720p','576p','480p')) > 5 ? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet', 'debrid'), 'Unknown')): []

/*Unknown Quality*/ count(quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), 'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV')) > 5 ? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), quality(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet', 'debrid'), 'Unknown')): []

tamtaro.name: {service.cached::istrue["⚡ Iɴsᴛᴀɴᴛ • "||"⏳ Uɴᴄᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ • "]}{service.shortName::exists["{service.shortName}"||""]}🔹 {stream.resolution::exists["{stream.resolution::replace('2160p','🟣 4K UHD')::replace('1440p','🟡 2K')::replace('1080p','🔵 1080ᴘ')::replace('720p','🟢 720ᴘ')::replace('480p','⚫ 480ᴘ')}"||"⚪ Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]} • {stream.quality::exists["{stream.quality::replace('BluRay REMUX','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('BLURAY REMUX','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('Bluray Remux','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('BluRay Remux','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('BluRay','💿 BʟᴜRᴀʏ')::replace('BLURAY','💿 BʟᴜRᴀʏ')::replace('WEB-DL','🍿 Wᴇʙ-DL')::replace('Web-dl','🍿 Wᴇʙ-DL')::replace('WEBRip','📼 WᴇʙRɪᴘ')::replace('Webrip','📼 WᴇʙRɪᴘ')::smallcaps}"||"🔘 Sᴛᴀɴᴅᴀʀᴅ"]}{stream.audioTags::exists["🔹 {stream.audioTags::join(' • ')::replace('Atmos','🎶 Aᴛᴍᴏs')::replace('TrueHD','💎 TʀᴜᴇHD')::replace('DTS-HD MA','🔷 DTS-HD MA')::replace('DTS-X','🎵 DTS-X')::replace('DDP','🎶 DD+')::replace('DD+','🎶 DD+')::replace('DD','🎵 DD')::replace('AAC','🎵 ᴀᴀᴄ')::replace('FLAC','💿 ꜰʟᴀᴄ')::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.audioChannels::exists[" • 🔊 {stream.audioChannels::join('/')}"||""]}{stream.audioTags::~(?i)(EAC3|DDP|DD\+)["🔹 🔊 JBL Sᴘᴀᴛɪᴀʟ"||""]}{stream.visualTags::~(?i)(SDR|HDR10)["🔹 ☀️ Hɪᴍᴀʟᴀʏᴀ"||""]}{stream.releaseGroup::~(?i)(epsilon|framestor|qxr|tigole|ntb|flux|d-z0n3|playbd|hifi|don|huno|bmf)["🔹 👑 Pʀᴇᴍɪᴜᴍ"||""]}{stream.editions::exists["🔹 🎬 {stream.editions::join(' • ')::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.filename::~Boutique["🔹 🎬 ʙᴏᴜᴛɪQᴜᴇ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Despecialized["🔹 🌌 ᴅᴇꜱCPEᴄɪᴀʟɪᴢᴇᴅ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Final.Cut["🔹 ✂️ ꜰɪɴᴀʟ ᴄᴜᴛ"||""]}{stream.filename::~International["🔹 🌍 ɪɴᴛᴇʀɴᴀᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Matte["🔹 🌌 ᴏᴘᴇɴ ᴍᴀᴛᴛᴇ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Uncensored["🔹 🩸 ᴜɴᴄᴇɴꜱᴏʀᴇᴅ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Unrated["🔹 🎬 ᴜɴʀᴀᴛᴇᴅ"||""]}{stream.filename::~IMAX["🔹 🎞️ ɪᴍᴀx"||""]}{stream.filename::~Hybrid["🔹 🧬 ʜʏʙʀɪᴅ"||""]}
tamtaro.description: 🗓️ {stream.age::>0["{stream.age} Dᴀʏs"||"✨ Nᴇᴡ"]}{stream.type::exists["🔹 ☁️ {stream.type::smallcaps}"||""]}{addon.name::exists["🔹 🧩 {addon.name::smallcaps}"||""]}{tools.newLine}{stream.bitrate::exists["⚡ {stream.bitrate::sbitrate::replace('MBPS','ᴍʙᴘs')::replace('Mbps','ᴍʙᴘs')::replace('KBPS','ᴋʙᴘs')::replace('Kbps','ᴋʙᴘs')::smallcaps}"||"⚡ Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]}{stream.size::>0["🔹 💾 {stream.size::sbytes::smallcaps}"||"🔹 💾 Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]}{stream.seeders::>0["🔹 🌱 {stream.seeders} Sᴇᴇᴅᴇʀs"||""]}{tools.newLine}{tools.newLine}🎞️ Vɪᴅᴇᴏ: {stream.visualTags::exists["{stream.visualTags::join('🔹 ')::replace('HDR10+','✨ ʜᴅʀ¹⁰⁺')::replace('HDR10','🌟 ʜᴅʀ¹⁰')::replace('SDR','☀️ SDR')::replace('HDR','🌟 HDR')::replace('DV','✨ DV')::replace('10BIT','🎨 10ʙɪᴛ')::replace('10bit','🎨 10ʙɪᴛ')::replace('STANDARD','Sᴛᴀɴᴅᴀʀᴅ')::replace('Standard','Sᴛᴀɴᴅᴀʀᴅ')::smallcaps}"||"☀️ SDR"]}{stream.encode::exists["🔹 ⚙️ {stream.encode::replace('HEVC','ʜᴇᴠᴄ')::replace('AVC','ᴀᴠᴄ')::replace('AV1','ᴀᴠ1')::smallcaps}"||""]}🔹 🌍 Lᴀɴɢ: {stream.languages::>1["ᴇɴɢʟɪsʜ🔹 🗣️ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ"||""]}{stream.languages::==1["{stream.languages::join('')::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.languages::exists[""||"Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]}{tools.newLine}🎯 Rᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇ: {stream.releaseGroup::exists["👑 {stream.releaseGroup::smallcaps}"||"👤 Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ GʀᴏᴜG"]}{stream.regexMatched::exists["🔹 🛡️ {stream.regexMatched::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.seadexBest::istrue["🔹 🏆 Bᴇsᴛ Rᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇ"||""]}
